description: Pre-meeting prep for Shelvi's weekly 1:1. Auto-populated from last-7d HubSpot activity, current dashboard state, and recurring ops themes. Concerns and questions are editable and persist locally. Attendee is set via the meetingAttendee field.
schedule: Auto-refreshed Monday 07:00 Sydney + on-demand from page Refresh button

meta.scheduledRunNote: Saturday auto-refresh — feed counters synced to live HubSpot/Gmail pulls. Manual concerns/questions/commitments preserved. Notion 1:1 db upsert will run on the Monday cadence.

summary: Week of Apr 20 — 7 RED OPDs moved, 5 AMBER flagged, 20 CA service tickets in flight, 11 pre-delivery checklists queued. 3 concerns surfaced.
executiveSummary: OPD hygiene held — 7 RED moved on Monday, zero past-OPD carried into Tuesday. 5 AMBER flagged for payment chase.
CA service queue has grown to 20 open tickets owned by Shelvi — triage capacity is the constraint, not inbound volume.
v5 Playbook customisation ownership rolled out cleanly (first full week end-to-end). Zero line-item/SO mismatches escaped into production.

opd.commentary: Monday sweep cleared. 5 AMBER still awaiting payment status before conversion next Monday.

tickets.commentary: 2 customisation holds (Mula-style line-item mismatch caught before SO creation). Refusal authority exercised cleanly per v5 §6.4.

customerComms.commentary: Pre-delivery send cadence = Tuesdays + Fridays. 3 payment chases open >48h — Teya escalation on deck for Friday.

globalServiceCA.commentary: Net +3. Shelvi absorbing Courtney's CA overflow while AU ops ramps. Not sustainable beyond Q2.

radaro.commentary: One driver comment flagged 'booth arrived damaged' on Stake install — routed to service queue, not ops.

concerns.title: CA Service queue growing under my ownership — 21 open tickets
concerns.detail: Net +1 since last refresh (now 21 open). Shelvi is absorbing Courtney's CA overflow while AU ops ramps. Not sustainable past Q2 without a second Canada ops owner or triage model. Oldest ticket is 13 days open.

concerns.title: 4 of 5 AMBER OPD tickets carry no payment-chase context
concerns.detail: AMBER = OPD 15–21 days out. 4 tickets show no approved_ticket_status and no recent activity on the deal. Risk: drop to RED next Monday with no audit trail for the push. Action: surface to Teya for payment status by Thursday.

concerns.title: Radaro PODs waiting >3 days on Courtney's fwd
concerns.detail: 3 install reports pending close-out — oldest is 4 days. Breaks the 48h Standardized Install Note SLA (v5 §11.1.1). Stake install carries a 'damaged on arrival' driver flag that needs routing to service, not ignored.

questions.question: CA service queue — is there a plan to bring on a second CA ops owner, or should I propose a triage cut-off (e.g., only warranty + escalations) and push the rest to a shared queue?
questions.context: I'm at 20 open, net +3 this week. Willing to propose a triage rule if we want to hold the line without hiring.

questions.question: v5 §6.4 gives me end-to-end customisation authority incl. refusal. Two holds this week were clean, but I hit one grey case where sales escalated. Do we want a documented escalation path (me → you) for disputed holds, or leave it case-by-case?
questions.context: Mula-style line-item/SO mismatches — the reason we rewrote §6.4 in the first place.

questions.question: Current rule: tag Teya at 24h, re-tag at 48h. 3 AMBER tickets are now past 48h with no movement. Should I loop Teya in earlier at AMBER stage (preemptive), or hold the rule?
questions.context: Preemptive = more noise for Teya, less chance of a RED next Monday. Current rule = cleaner signal but we risk the drop.

questions.question: v5 §11.1.1 — ops never emails customer post-install; Deal Owner handles it. One sales rep pushed back this week saying they're too thin to pick up the handoff. Do we reinforce the rule with sales leadership, or build a template pack to make it trivial for them?
questions.context: Template pack is more scalable but it's not our lane.

questions.question: Any visibility I should have on container delays this quarter? I'm tracking OPD hygiene downstream but I don't see upstream shipment risk until Tyler's sheet updates.
questions.context: Would like to pre-flag impacted tickets before Monday OPD review, not react after the OPD slips.

theirActionItems.item: Loop Paul in on customisation refusals dispute process

myCommitments.item: Roll out v5 §6.4 end-to-end customisation workflow — full week
Update Notion — refund/cancel SOP draft v2
